New Year’s Email Promotion #1				                Copyright Free Template



Subject:  New Year, New Incentive, New [insert transformation you provide]



Dear (first name), 



If you’re like most, you probably overindulged in stuffing, 

turkey and holiday cookies the last month or so.  



And you’re starting to realize that “real life” must resume 

soon. 



Well, here’s your chance to kick off 2015 right with 

a special deal that’ll [insert benefit you provide]. 



[insert deal]



This is one New Year’s Resolution you don’t want to 

miss.  While most people will be starting new diets, 

new exercise programs and new habits…



…you’ll be kicking off the New Year right with [insert 

deal and transformation they’ll see]. 



But once [insert deadline] comes and goes, I’m 

taking this deal down for good.  And you’ll have to pay

what “everybody else” pays into the New Year. 



So don’t start 2015 off on the wrong foot.  Take 

action today and start [insert benefits]. 



Happy New Year!



[insert name]
